  1. com.societegenerale.failover.core.propagator
  2. ContextPropagator

Uses of Interface
com.societegenerale.failover.core.propagator.ContextPropagator

Packages that use ContextPropagator
Package
Description
com.societegenerale.failover.configuration
Spring Boot auto-configuration for the failover framework.
com.societegenerale.failover.core
Central failover handler and execution abstractions.
com.societegenerale.failover.core.propagator
Thread-local context propagation for async scatter/gather dispatch.
com.societegenerale.failover.propagator
Auto-configured context propagators for scatter/gather async dispatch.
com.societegenerale.failover.store.multitenant
Multi-tenant failover store with per-tenant routing.

  • Uses of ContextPropagator in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration

    Methods in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration that return ContextPropagator
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ContextPropagator
    FailoverAutoConfiguration.contextPropagator(org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider<TenantContextPropagator> tenantPropagatorProvider, org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider<MicrometerContextPropagator> micrometerPropagatorProvider)
    Composes the active ContextPropagator from available propagator beans: TenantContextPropagator — present when failover.store.multitenant.enabled=true MicrometerContextPropagator — present when io.micrometer.tracing.Tracer is on classpath and a Tracer bean exists MdcContextPropagator — always included Declare your own ContextPropagator bean to replace this composition entirely.
    Methods in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration with parameters of type ContextPropagator
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FailoverHandler<Object>
    FailoverAutoConfiguration.failoverHandler(KeyGenerator keyGenerator, ExpiryPolicy<Object> expiryPolicy, FailoverClock clock, FailoverStore<Object> failoverStore, PayloadEnricher<Object> payloadEnricher, RecoveredPayloadHandler recoveredPayloadHandler, CompositeReportPublisher reportPublisher, FailoverExpiryExtractor failoverExpiryExtractor, PayloadSplitterLookup<Object,Object> payloadSplitterLookup, ContextPropagator contextPropagator, org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider<org.springframework.core.task.TaskExecutor> scatterGatherExecutorProvider)
    Assembles the full FailoverHandler decorator chain: AdvancedFailoverHandler(ScatterGatherFailoverHandler(DefaultFailoverHandler)).

  • Uses of ContextPropagator in com.societegenerale.failover.core

    Constructors in com.societegenerale.failover.core with parameters of type ContextPropagator
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    ScatterGatherFailoverHandler(FailoverHandler<T> delegateT, FailoverHandler<R> delegateR, PayloadSplitterLookup<T,R> payloadSplitterLookup, @Nullable Executor executor, ContextPropagator contextPropagator)
    Full constructor — use when parallel scatter and/or context propagator is required.

  • Uses of ContextPropagator in com.societegenerale.failover.core.propagator

    Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.core.propagator that implement ContextPropagator
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    CompositeContextPropagator
    ContextPropagator that chains multiple propagators, applying each in order.
    class 
    MdcContextPropagator
    ContextPropagator that propagates the SLF4J Mapped Diagnostic Context (MDC) across executor boundaries in scatter/gather operations.
    Methods in com.societegenerale.failover.core.propagator that return ContextPropagator
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static @NonNull ContextPropagator
    ContextPropagator.noOp()
    No-op propagator — passes tasks through unchanged.
    Methods in com.societegenerale.failover.core.propagator with parameters of type ContextPropagator
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static CompositeContextPropagator
    CompositeContextPropagator.of(ContextPropagator... propagators)
    Creates a composite from a varargs array of propagators.
    Method parameters in com.societegenerale.failover.core.propagator with type arguments of type ContextPropagator
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static CompositeContextPropagator
    CompositeContextPropagator.of(List<ContextPropagator> propagators)
    Creates a composite from a list of propagators.

  • Uses of ContextPropagator in com.societegenerale.failover.propagator

    Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.propagator that implement ContextPropagator
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    MicrometerContextPropagator
    ContextPropagator that propagates the active Micrometer Span across executor boundaries in scatter/gather operations.

  • Uses of ContextPropagator in com.societegenerale.failover.store.multitenant

    Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.store.multitenant that implement ContextPropagator
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    TenantContextPropagator
    ContextPropagator that propagates the current tenant ID from TenantContext across executor boundaries in scatter/gather operations.
